name: FM Core
explanation: A clean two-operator FM synth built on the textbook Chowning algorithm: one modulator phase-modulates one carrier. Ratio sets the modulator:carrier frequency relationship (quantised to musical half-integers), Index sets the FM depth, and the signature Index Env makes that depth decay over each note so the tone starts bright and bell-like then settles. Operator Feedback adds extra harmonics and edge. 8-voice poly. Controls: Ratio, Index, Index Env, Feedback, Decay and Level.
